items.title: Bolt Card
items.description: Lightning-enabled NFC card for tap-to-pay Bitcoin transactions. Originally from CoinCorner; compatible with third-party Bolt Card Hub services.

items.title: Breez
items.description: Mobile Lightning wallet for iOS and Android. Built on Flutter. Non-custodial, Lightning-native, and includes a built-in marketplace plus point-of-sale (POS) support.
